scripts.verify:full: pnpm verify && pnpm --filter content-reviewer clean:next && pnpm e2e
scripts.verify: pnpm install && pnpm lint && pnpm --filter content-reviewer prisma:generate && pnpm typecheck && pnpm build && pnpm test
